difficulty.reason: Direct sow after frost, big seeds easy to handle, quick to produce, nitrogen fixer

growth_stages.name: Germination
growth_stages.look_for: Fat stems pushing up through the soil, seed leaves unfurling

prompt.en: The bean seeds you planted are STRONG -- see them push right through the soil!
prompt.da: De boennefroe, du plantede, er STAERKE -- se dem presse lige op gennem jorden!

growth_stages.name: Vegetative Growth
growth_stages.look_for: Bushy plant about 30-40cm tall with trifoliate leaves

prompt.en: Look in the leaves for tiny white or purple flowers -- each one becomes a bean!
prompt.da: Kig i bladene efter smaa hvide eller lilla blomster -- hver en bliver til en boenne!

growth_stages.name: Flowering & Pod Set
growth_stages.look_for: Small white flowers turning into thin green beans

prompt.en: Can you find the tiny bean fingers hiding under the leaves?
prompt.da: Kan du finde de bitte boennefingre, der gemmer sig under bladene?

growth_stages.name: Harvest
growth_stages.look_for: Green beans about 12-15cm long, firm and snappy

prompt.en: Hold the stem with one hand, snap the bean off with the other! Listen for the SNAP!
prompt.da: Hold stammen med en haand, knaek boennen af med den anden! Lyt efter KNAKKET!

human_readable.en: Water when soil surface is dry. Extra water during flowering and podding.
human_readable.da: Vand naar jordoverfladen er toer. Ekstra vand under blomstring og baelgdannelse.

harvest.notes: Pick regularly to keep producing. 50-55 days to harvest. Nitrogen fixer -- good for soil.

companion_plants.notes: Beans fix nitrogen, benefiting brassicas. ALL alliums inhibit bean nitrogen fixation.

message.en: Frost warning for beans! Cover with fleece tonight!
message.da: Frostadvarsel for boenner! Daek med fiberdug i aften!

message.en: Beans need water, especially during flowering and podding!
message.da: Boenner har brug for vand, isaer under blomstring og baelgdannelse!
